B:
Here's a value prop and supporting bullets for a no-code internal-tools builder:

---

**Value prop:**
Ship the internal tools your team needs in an afternoon, not a sprint—no engineers required.

**Supporting bullets:**
- **Connect what you already have.** Plug straight into your databases, APIs, and spreadsheets, then build admin panels, dashboards, and workflows on top with drag-and-drop—no glue code, no migrations.
- **Built for real teams, not just prototypes.** Granular permissions, audit logs, and approval flows come standard, so the tool you launch on Friday is one IT actually trusts on Monday.

---

Want me to tailor it to a specific audience (ops teams, startups, enterprise IT) or match a particular tone—punchier, more technical, or more enterprise?
G:
Internal tools, built in hours not weeks — without writing code.

- **Ship without engineering bandwidth:** drag-and-drop UI on top of your existing databases and APIs, so ops and support teams build the dashboards, admin panels, and CRUD apps they need without waiting on a dev sprint.
- **Safe by default:** granular permissions, audit logs, and SSO come standard, so what your team builds stays governed and compliant.
F:
**Ship the internal tools your team needs in an afternoon, not a sprint — no engineers required.**

- **Drag-and-drop on top of your real data.** Connect Postgres, REST, or a spreadsheet and build dashboards, admin panels, and approval flows visually — every table, button, and form wired to live records.
- **Safe enough for ops, fast enough for everyone.** Role-based permissions, audit logs, and one-click sharing mean you hand a tool to the team without handing over database access.
